movies.title: That nghiep chuyen sinh (Phan 3)
movies.description: Mushoku Tensei ke ve mot nguoi dan ong vo danh, that nghiep va song khap kin voi cuoc doi day tien nuoi. Sau khi qua doi trong mot tai nan, anh bat ngo duoc tai sinh o mot the gioi gia tuong voi than phan moi la Rudeus Greyrat. Du mang hinh hai cua mot dua tre, Rudeus van giu nguyen ky uc va kinh nghiem tu kien truoc. Quyet tam khong lap lai nhung sai lam cu, cau tu nhu se tan dung co hoi thu hai nay de song mot cuoc doi tron ven va khong con hoi tiec. Trong the gioi tran ngap phep thuat va nhung cuoc phieu luu ky thu, Rudeus khong ngung hoc hoi, ren luyen suc manh, ket giao voi nhung nguoi ban moi va tung buoc truong thanh.
movies.info:
Dao dien: Ryosuke Shibuya
Dien vien: Yumi Uchiyama, Yoshimi Kohara, Ai Kakuma
Quoc gia: Nhat Ban

movies.title: 100 co ban gai yeu ban rat rat rat rat rat nhieu (Phan 3)
movies.description: Cau chuyen xoay quanh Yuki, mot sinh vien dai hoc khiem thinh. Cuoc song cua co chu yeu xoay quanh ban be va mang xa hoi, nhung mot cuoc gap go tinh co tren tau da thay doi tat ca khi co gap Itsuomi, mot nguoi ban cua ban co. Itsuomi co the noi ba ngon ngu, nhung lai khong biet ngon ngu ky hieu, dieu nay dat ra nhung thach thuc va cung mo ra co hoi de ca hai xay dung mot moi quan he doc dao.
movies.info:
Dao dien: Takahiro Omori
Dien vien: Kaede Hondo, Nao Toyama, Ryota Osaka, Sumire Morohoshi, Takeo Otsuka, Tasuku Hatanaka, Yu Miyazaki
Quoc gia: Nhat Ban
